since_last: 85% of 99 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +4.37%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 85% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.81% · BTC +1.60% · Gold +1.54% · Nasdaq100 +1.62%. 85% of 99 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +4.37%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +4.37%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.43%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +11.54%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +11.54%, HPE +10.54%, LRCX +6.94%, CEVA +6.84%, FIX +6.17%. Laggards: AVAV -5.78%, PLTR -2.71%, IBM -2.67%, CRM -2.64%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.66% at $152.25
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.66% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
